problem id: 845fee60
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  10000110 -> 00011001
  01100001 -> 10000100
  11100101 -> 10010101
  10001010 -> 00101001
  11111010 -> 11101001
  00110001 -> 11000100
  00001000 -> 00100000
  11110011 -> 11001101
  01111011 -> 11101100
  01011011 -> 01101100

query: 01011100
predicted answer: 01110000
